signals.headline: US-Iran ceasefire talks collapse in Pakistan; Trump announces Navy blockade of Strait of Hormuz** | NO | HIGH confidence
signals.raw:
US-Iran ceasefire talks collapse in Pakistan; Trump announces Navy blockade of Strait of Hormuz** | NO | HIGH confidence[1][2]

Failed negotiations over Iran's nuclear ambitions ended without agreement on April 13, 2026, prompting President Trump to order a US Navy blockade of ships entering or leaving the Strait of Hormuz, effective immediately[1][2]. A fragile two-week ceasefire remains in place

signals.headline: Bank of Korea holding benchmark interest rate at **2
signals.raw: Bank of Korea holding benchmark interest rate at **2.5%** on April 10, 2026 (7th consecutive month), citing inflation at ~**2.2%** (above 2% target) and oil price risks from Middle East conflict—widely anticipated, unlikely to shift markets significantly.[4]
matched_markets: Will the price of XRP be above $1.10 on April 14?
Will the price of Solana be above $70 on April 14?
Will the price of Bitcoin be above $82,000 on April 15?

signals.headline: Annual inflation at **2
signals.raw: Annual inflation at **2.2%** in March 2026 (up from 2.0% in Jan/Feb, below 2.4% forecast); held at **2.0%** (BOK target) in Jan/Feb after easing to five-month low.[1][2][3]
matched_markets: Will South Korea’s 2026 Annual Inflation be between 2.7% and 2.9%?

signals.headline: OECD raised 2026 inflation forecast to **2
signals.raw: OECD raised 2026 inflation forecast to **2.7%** (from prior), lowered growth to **1.7%**, due to oil shocks—no specific date in results, but not "right now."[7]

signals.headline: Market volatility from oil prices (Middle East tensions), weakening won (~1,520/USD), and KOSPI plunge, but no new infla
signals.raw: Market volatility from oil prices (Middle East tensions), weakening won (~1,520/USD), and KOSPI plunge, but no new inflation data releases.[5][6]

signals.headline: HIGH confidence**: Search results show no events post-April 10; latest inflation data is March 2026
signals.raw: HIGH confidence**: Search results show no events post-April 10; latest inflation data is March 2026.[1][2][4]
